item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-016","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"回答明确指出留存差时增长会变成“漏桶”，并把命题重构为按阶段判断：样本不足时先小规模增长验证需求，有稳定留存后再放大增长。没有给出平均分配式建议，结论也足够明确。"}
